case_title: LUNDSTROM, LEIGH VS JAMARAMI, SHOHREH (DRIVER) et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE FILED BY SONOMA CO SHERIFF--UNABLE TO SERVE DEFT JAMARAMI, SHOHREH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUNDSTROM, LEIGH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMARAMI, SHOHREH (DRIVER) NAZERI, AKBAR M.
